CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. Enter the portion of loan payoff amounts at closing that represent Deferred Interest or Shared Appreciation repaid. These show up in payoffs despite not being part of the original loans, so must be accounted for when calculating retired principal.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the portion of loan payoff amounts at closing that represent Deferred Interest or Shared Appreciation repaid. These show up in payoffs despite not being part of the original loans, so must be accounted for when calculating retired principal.
CustomField.label: Deferred Interest/Appreciation Repaid
